programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The funeral of a blues legend and subsequent killing of his former bass player plunges Jessica into the middle of a murder mystery that has remained unsolved for 20 years. Angela Lansbury, William Atherton, Logan Ramsey and Olivia Cole star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Three similar execution-style killings take place, and the team discovers one of the victims was going through a messy divorce. His widow falls under suspicion of committing the first two crimes to mask the murder of her husband - but, unfortunately for the agents, she has an alibi. Starring Michael Weatherly and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs entrusts the team with the task of finding his former commanding officer, who has gone on the run rather than staying behind to face charges of killing a marine and stealing funds. Kate and Tony's investigation leads them to the missing man's cabin - which has been sprayed with bullets and contains an unidentified corpse. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A double homicide is linked to diamonds used to fund civil war in Sierra Leone, and the detectives uncover the extent of the fighting when warring factions are found in the United States. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an apartment block resident prompts Briscoe and Green to investigate her long-standing battle with the landlord in the hope of finding a credible suspect. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting of a sleazy retired policeman in a neighbourhood notorious for prostitution leads Briscoe and Curtis to two suburban housewives who are secretly moonlighting. However, it soon becomes apparent that whoever killed the victim could have been acting in self-defence. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a state senator suspected of involvement in the disappearance of one of his aides. Their progress is hindered by a lack of evidence, but when her body is found in a marsh, the case turns into a murder inquiry. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe the fatal stabbing of psychologist Tracy Conley may be linked to confidential client information on her computer. They learn one of the files on her hard drive has been tampered with since her death - information that would have ensured a known rapist spends another five years behind bars. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A carjacking turns nasty when an off-duty police officer is killed and the driver is kidnapped. Luckily, Briscoe and Curtis capture one of the perpetrators, who offers to reveal the whereabouts of the missing driver to DA Ross - in exchange for immunity on the cop-killing charge. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky, Gerald and Kate are taken hostage by a gunman who demands evidence relating to the recent shooting of a suspected terrorist. As Gibbs and the team struggle to resolve the crisis, they are alarmed to discover there is a Hamas operative in their midst. Crime drama, guest starring Alan Dale (Ugly Betty)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As Gibbs recovers from his gunshot wound, the team is called in to investigate the killing of a US Marine and tries to determine whether the crime is related to an alleged case of blackmail at an illegal nightclub. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former US Navy Seal escapes from prison, intent on finding his wife's real murderer. The break-out sparks a race against time as the NCIS team tries to reach him before he exacts revenge. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A protected witness is shot dead in a restaurant, setting Goren and Eames on the trail of a trio of mobsters. They finally identify the key figure, but cannot find anyone willing to testify against him. Goren seeks the help of a don dying of cancer to get closer to their target. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren learns that his old enemy Nicole Wallace is engaged to the brother of a murdered health inspector, and suspects that she must have played a part in the crime - but eventually sets aside his prejudices and reluctantly enlists her help to catch the real killer. Meanwhile, Logan joins the Major Case squad, but finds himself relegated to the background, so Deakins tries to find a partner for him

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Newcomer Carolyn Barek is partnered with Logan to investigate a spate of increasingly violent jewellery shop robberies, and takes the calculated risk of revealing details about his past in a bid to ensnare a mother-and-son team of suspects - a move he finds deeply troubling. Drama, starring Annabella Sciorra and Chris Noth

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigators find three bodies when they arrive at the scene of an accident involving a truck full of revellers, and find a lead when one of the dead is identified as the daughter of an unpopular trade-union boss. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Carmine Giovinazzo and Hill Harper

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of shootings at a nightclub, where a bartender and two patrons were killed by a hitman, who then proceeded to kidnap someone. Hawes is stunned when the abducted woman is revealed to be Camille Jordanson, a childhood friend who has become embroiled in a messy counterfeit pill scheme and seems to have made a few enemies in the criminal underworld. Guest starring singer Ne-Yo

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The crime drama returns with a call from a mysterious stranger igniting an explosive chain of events, with the first of a two-part story told from Castle's perspective as he searches for his Beckett. Nathan Fillion and Stana Katic star

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Part two of two. After receiving a mysterious tip from someone from her past, Beckett is launched into a fight for her life with a team of mercenaries hot on her trail. While Castle investigates why his wife is on the run, Beckett must figure out who wants her dead before they can finish the job

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When one of her friends is charged with murdering her abusive husband, Jessica sets about proving her innocence and comes up with a list of suspects including the victim's mistress and stepson. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As Gibbs recovers from his gunshot wound, the team is called in to investigate the killing of a US Marine and tries to determine whether the crime is related to an alleged case of blackmail at an illegal nightclub. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.desc: A former US Navy Seal escapes from prison, intent on finding his wife's real murderer. The break-out sparks a race against time as the NCIS team tries to reach him before he exacts revenge. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a singer's wife, questioning the man's manager - who proves to have formerly owned the murder weapon. Meanwhile, an unscrupulous defence lawyer embarks on a smear campaign against the victim. Gary Busey guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team discovers a former fingerprint examiner may have provided false testimony to help the prosecution in several court cases. To make matters worse, it transpires that Van Buren earned her promotion thanks to two of these fraudulent convictions. Award-winning police drama, starring S Epatha Merkerson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: First of a three-part story. The team investigates when the headless corpse of a film studio executive is found floating in a river, and her personal trainer and ex-husband soon prove likely suspects. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl is found suffocated to death in Central Park, Briscoe and Green discover her adoptive mother's attempts to discipline the child may have inadvertently caused the tragedy. However, the case is thrown into confusion when a post-mortem reveals she may actually have died of an allergic reaction. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is found dead in an apartment building, and Briscoe and Green suspect an improper website may have played a part in her murder. As McCoy and Southerlyn investigate the case further, they realise the victim's best friend, who was reluctant to come forward as a witness, may provide the answers. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Jesse L Martin and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives probe the shooting of a motorist, and arrest a man who helped the victim change a tyre on his car shortly before he was killed. The suspect protests his innocence, and points the investigators in the direction of another man who admits to the crime and even signs a confession, but further inquiries cast doubt on his guilt. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team are called in to investigate the murder of a fellow NCIS agent. Seemingly aware that he was about to be killed, the victim is known to have swallowed a memory card relating to a cold case he was working on. Tony goes undercover to glean more information - and gets the surprise of his life. Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a US Marine and discovers three former members of his unit have recently died. Digging deeper, evidence is uncovered suggesting the commander may be a serial killer who preys on his own men. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The remains of a US Marine are found impaled on a tree stump in a forest, where Tony discovers a shell from a multi-purpose assault weapon. The investigation leads to a pawn shop - where evidence of a botched illegal arms deal is uncovered. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: After a stunning discovery. Syd and McKenna debate who they can trust, while also investigating a death that took place at a scenic Los Angeles park

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A prison warden is attacked while delivering a ransom payment to secure the release of his wife, who was allegedly kidnapped 10 years previously. Eames and Goren investigate - and discover the missing woman is actually living happily with an escaped prisoner

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When a police officer's son is murdered by the Mob, it is not long before Logan and Barek realise he was not the intended target. Their investigation leads them to two rival Mafia families, but it soon becomes apparent a more sinister plot involving police corruption is waiting to be unveiled

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial rapist is murdered and his body is left bound and gagged in the same fashion as the women he attacked. Suspecting the killer may be one of the criminal's former victims, Mac and the team are left with mixed feelings about bringing the culprit to justice. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An unidentified woman found dead in an alleyway appears to have taken a heroin overdose, but further inspection reveals someone may have had a hand in administering the fatal drugs. Mac recognises the victim as conspiracy-obsessed Tessa James, and as he works to explore whether there was truth in her stories, the investigation leads to an elite gentlemen's club that has traces of blood on the walls. Starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The author poses as a college professor so he can investigate the gruesome murder of a student, but he and Beckett soon discover dark secrets the university wants to keep hidden

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A famously reclusive author turns up dead and Castle is determined to solve his hero's murder, but he and Beckett discover that truth is stranger than fiction as they dig deeper

programme.title: NCIS

programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to identify the charred remains of a woman caught in an apartment block fire, which was started deliberately. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Southerlyn battle the lawyers over the fatal shooting of an uninvited nightclub guest who was seen confronting popular rap star Darry 'G-Trane' moments before the murder. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part two of three. A witness reveals that personal trainer Newman flew to Los Angeles on the night of the murder, leading the officers to believe they have the wrong man. When blood matching the dead film studio executive's is found in their new suspect's car, they soon arrest him but their case may not be clear-cut enough to warrant a conviction. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an investment analyst whose dealings with a bankrupt company left many clients penniless. Overcoming initial problems with identifying the victim, they pick up on a clue that leads them to the dead man's attorney, who was apparently the last person to see him alive. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the stabbing of a college activist, whose knowledge of a beef supplier's poor sanitary conditions may have led to his death. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a book editor who was reputedly having an affair with one of her authors, and find themselves focusing on the lover's long-time companion, whose alibi turns out to be a tissue of lies. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy Seal falls to his death while training for a secret mission and his commanding officer believes it was an accident. Analysis of the victim's equipment proves it was sabotaged, but fingerprints at the crime scene reveal nothing, prompting the agents to re-enact the sequence of events before the time allocated for the assignment runs out

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs faces an old adversary who has re-emerged with a plan to assassinate the US president and taken Kate hostage in a bid to ensure success. The FBI manages to foil the attack on the presidential helicopter, Marine One, but the case seems set to end on a downbeat note. Rudolf Martin guest stars, with Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy captain is held hostage in his own office while his wife and blind daughter are abducted, and the kidnappers try to extort a large sum of money from him for his family's release. The NCIS team is soon on the case, but initially struggles to identify the chief assailant

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The assault of a teenage girl leads to a shocking discovery. Benson has a short-lived, tragic reunion with someone from her past

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a respected nun who rescued child prostitutes and discover someone has attempted to cover up parts of the crime. They are led to a man whose half-brother was the victim of a race-hate attack 17 years previously, and begin to believe the two incidents could be linked

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Part one of two. The disappearance of a teenager unites both pairs of detectives. The investigation is complicated by the discovery that their prime suspect - now implicated in another missing persons' case - is the son of an eminent judge. Starring Kathryn Erbe, Vincent D'Onofrio, Chris Noth and Annabella Sciorra, with guest star Colm Meaney

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A popular girl at an exclusive school is murdered and an examination of her clothes reveals evidence of a substance that Adam believes could only have come from Mars. The detectives discover a male pupil is in possession of a lizard that may be responsible for the strange traces and an exploration of his link to the victim uncovers incidences of jealousy and bullying

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An old man is fatally shot on a subway platform, but the investigation reveals the victim is in fact a woman wearing an elaborate disguise. Inquiries fail to reveal her identity, but Hawkes makes an intriguing discovery regarding the nature of the murder weapon, providing the team with a more viable lead. Meanwhile, Jo decides the time is right to tell daughter Ellie the truth about her biological mother

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and team are called to a car park, where they examine the dead body of a courier who had been driving a bulletproof car with a secret compartment built into the floor. The victim was delivering a very important load - a Van Gogh painting bought at auction for $64million - which is now missing. Castle and Beckett work with the key witness to track down the painting and catch the killer

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: While Beckett is out of town, Castle becomes involved with Detective Slaughter in a case where a hi-tech chip has been stolen and one of Slaughter's informants is murdered

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Met Police helicopter India 99 is called to help rescue a woman who jumped into the Thames near the Palace of Westminster, as well as her two daughters, who leapt in after her. Elsewhere, the helicopter team coordinates a risky game of cat-and-mouse as police chase a group of graffiti artists across live train tracks in a patch of industrial wasteland in Battersea. Dom and Sue are called to the address of a potentially violent woman, followed by a callout to a young heroin addict. Jordan and Katie attend to 21-year-old Stephen, who has tried to kill himself by jumping from a bridge into a canal, while Mark and Verity treat 35-year-old Brett, who has suffered alcohol dependency for 18 years and does not know where to turn

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: Investigators head to out to a property they've visited before in the desert, where 30 dogs are living in what is essentially a rubbish tip. Can they remove them all safely?

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix

programme.desc: The rescue team gets a call to assist a stray dog trying to deliver puppies. With two pups delivered alive and more to come, will she get help in time?

programme.desc: Thomas Plant and James Lewis pick up unusual items as they travel from the west to the east coast across Scotland in their classic car, before heading to auction to see whose haul is most popular with buyers

programme.desc: Thomas Plant takes a financial gamble and James Lewis talks to animals on the third leg of their trip around Scotland, before heading to an auction to find out whose haul proves most popular with buyers

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore saves items from the tip in Walsall, with blacksmith Bex Simon coming up with a new use for metal shelves and upholsterer Anthony Devine revamping an armchair

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the work of the West Midlands Ambulance Service, beginning with a distraught wife being coached over the phone on how to give CPR to her husband who collapsed suddenly at home, as crews race to save him. Elsewhere, controller Glennis has her hands full as she attempts to juggle between helping a crew search for an elderly man who has fallen in an alley way, and a high priority call for a street brawl taking place, with reports of a man being badly beaten with a baseball bat

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: The team looks back on its most memorable rescues. Plus, updates on the progress of some of the animals saved

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: When Barney, a dog with an embedded collar, is spotted in the Houston countryside Investigator Kristi Franks is called into action and a desperate chase ensues

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Tia rescues a neglected puppy living in filthy conditions. Two owners want a companion for their four-year-old dog, Chase

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps, with help from Tania and Mariah. Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore saves items from the tip in Walsall, with blacksmith Bex Simon coming up with a new use for metal shelves and upholsterer Anthony Devine revamping an armchair

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and James Lewis's antiques challenge in Scotland gets to its fourth day, but unexpected mechanical problems with their vehicle hamper proceedings, just as the race to find the most profitable items reaches fever pitch before tomorrow's showdown. Tim Wonnacott narrates

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the final part of their treasure-hunting contest around Scotland, Thomas Plant opts for two-wheeled transportation rather than four, and James Lewis discovers the origins of popular New Year's anthem Auld Lang Syne

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialise. Meanwhile, a mother and daughter have bonded over their bodies

programme.title: My Violent Child
programme.desc: Laverne Antrobus tries to help Emma and Adrian, who are struggling to cope with eight-year-old son Ioan, whose violent behaviour means getting him to bed can take up to six hours. Laverne is worried both by Ioan's violence and by Emma's use of restraints, so she institutes a new bedtime routine, and helps Adrian to strengthen his relationship with Ioan by getting out of the house and doing outdoor activities

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown UK
programme.desc: Nick Groff and Katrina Weidman spend 72 hours confined in one of the UK's most notorious haunted hotspots - Shepton Mallet Prison, Somerset, where the duo investigate the spirits 'locked' inside

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: The team travels to Duluth in Minnesota aiming to investigate the Nopeming Sanatorium, a building whose history is filled with death, murder and suicide. The ghost hunters find out about the many TB deaths at the hospital, as well as measures taken to stem the high suicide rate, and aim to capture some of the rumoured spirits on film

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak Bagans and his colleagues encounter dark energy - and a long-dead prisoner - at the Yuma Territorial Prison in Arizona

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: The North West Ambulance crews are being kept busy by a repeat caller who moves around Manchester's canals on his barge. Scott and Ana are the first to track him down and must remain patient in the face of his frustrating behaviour. Pragna and Amy are dispatched to a man threatening suicide, and Sarah and Alan treat a baby burnt by a cup of tea, before the normal routine of the night is interrupted by multiple calls reporting a serious incident near the Trafford Centre

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Investigator Jennifer Francis intervenes when she spots two horses being dragged behind a vehicle on a busy motorway

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: The team faces the difficult task of catching and transporting two emus to the Houston SPCA. A routine capture becomes an emergency rescue

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: A homeless man asks the shelter to take his puppies, so Mariah and Marcel decide to help people living on the streets with their dogs by handing out goodie bags

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

Eventually, a whale that begins to circle the stricken craft offers unlikely assistance. Joe Flanigan and Torri Higginson star

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: An amorous Ferengi kidnaps Lwaxana Troi and her daughter after she spurns his advances, and plans to use mind probes on her in an effort to study her telepathic abilities. Sci-fi adventure, with Patrick Stewart, Jonathan Frakes and guest star Majel Barrett

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Legendary Klingon hero Kor asks Worf for help in undertaking one last mission - but it gradually becomes clear the veteran is dangerously past his prime. Starring Michael Dorn, Rene Auberjonois and John Colicos

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Part two of three. Archer and T'Pol encounter the Syrranites, a radical group hiding in the desert. The NX-01 crew contends with Vulcan power ploys as it emerges the attack was more than a simple act of terrorism

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Harry Langford enlists McGarrett and Danny's help to track down a teenage British royal who has run away while under his protection. Plus, Grover, Tani and Junior work a cold case

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda helps a ghost who is trying to protect his sister - a student involved in a love triangle. Paranormal drama, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda investigates a nurse's claims that she is being haunted by the spectre of a former patient who accuses her of murdering him. Paranormal drama, with Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The story of 17-year-old Claire Woolterton. In 1981, her body was found dumped in the River Thames in Windsor

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The crimes of Colin Ireland, a cold and calculated serial killer who brutally snatched away the lives of five innocent men

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: There is a tense stand-off as officers try to talk down a man brandishing a samurai sword, while the cells fill up during a busy Saturday night in Newcastle

programme.title: Police Force: Australia
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of police forces across Australia as they deal with situations from sieges and major drug busts, to murder investigations

programme.title: Police Force: Australia
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of police forces across Australia as they deal with situations from sieges and major drug busts, to murder investigations

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: New. Follow Australia's traffic enforcers as they face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: New. Follow Australia's traffic enforcers as they face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Fixers
programme.desc: Four passionate builders in 10 remote locations, have one mission: to improve lives. They will do whatever it takes-saving the world, one build at a time

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: The Belstone Fox (1973)
programme.desc: A huntsman adopts a fox cub into his pack of hounds, and the animal becomes a local celebrity, until a disastrous hunt turns his human friends against him. Wildlife adventure based on David Rook's novel, starring Eric Porter, Bill Travers and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Manganinnie (1980)
programme.desc: An Australian Aboriginal woman goes in search of her lost tribe, accompanied on her journey by a lost white girl. with whom she forms a close bond despite having no common language. As their journey towards the coast continues, the woman begins to suspect her people and culture may have been all but wiped out by British colonists. Historical drama, starring Mawuyul Yanthalawuy and Anna Ralph

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Personal reminiscences from Frenchmen who were forced by the Nazis to build ramps and construct rockets, and a look at the site of Hitler's supergun that was trained on London

programme.title: London Live News

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel

programme.title: After You've Gone

programme.title: London Districts

programme.title: Father's Kingdom

programme.title: One Good Turn (1954)
programme.desc: A boy living in an orphanage grows up to be the institution's lovable but clumsy caretaker. He must save the children's home from a wicked property developer who wants to build a factory on the site, and tricks him into taking the kids to the seaside so he can knock the building down. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom and Joan Rice

programme.title: The Best of Men
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the birth of the Paralympics in 1948. Pioneering neurologist Dr Ludwig Guttmann arrives at Stoke Mandeville Hospital in Buckinghamshire and begins to transform the lives of his patients - Second World War servicemen with spinal cord injuries. He suggests using sport as a key part of their rehabilitation, and gets them involved in activities including wheelchair polo and basketball. Starring Eddie Marsan, Rob Brydon, George Mackay and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Woolwich, Deptford and Lewisham. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy enlists his mother-in-law's help in a pub quiz and they win, but the victory is short-lived when Diana realises she answered a question incorrectly. She insists on handing the money to the actual winning team, which happens to include Siobhan. Starring Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Fitness Saved My Life
programme.desc: Following his release from prison, Micquel transformed his life through fitness. Now a bodybuilding champion, he's a mission to help others

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright and Chris Hollins follow the work of food inspectors, who protect the public from unhygienic restaurants and potentially harmful foodstuffs. In the first edition, they investigate the problem of counterfeit bottles of alcohol, which are often dangerously strong, and members of an unsuspecting family have their mealtime assessed to see whether their cooking poses any health risks. The team also examines one of the most harmful bacteria

programme.title: This Could Go Anywhere
programme.desc: Phil Tufnell and Brendon McCullum travel all over New Zealand - playing golf and discovering the country's most famous and picturesque courses

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot offers his body and Gary fixes up a burglar alarm in forlorn efforts to impress Deborah

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dorothy welcomes Gary's suggestion of an open relationship, while Dermot continues to woo Deborah

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: Paul and his family have to deal with the pressure of mounting allegations against him, and Dee confronts her former babysitter, Christina, now one of the star's accusers. Marie is rattled to discover she was away on the nights Paul is accused of assaulting her, and the accused gives a radio interview, determined to put his side of the story. Drama, starring Robbie Coltrane and Julie Walters

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: The Hitman's Apprentice (2012)
programme.desc: A bumbling teenager is offered a job by his mother's crime boss boyfriend. He is given the task of driving one of the gangster's business associates around town, only to find himself an assistant to a hitman on his last assignment, a mission that leads to a deadly encounter with a mysterious woman. Thriller, starring Tim Roth, Jack O'Connell and Talulah Riley

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between 2-8 miles from around Britain. Andrew White will guide you through the best walkways that Great Britain has to offer.

programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Vicky paints a portrait of Celine as a gift for her birthday

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: UBOS
programme.desc: Cassy, Vern & Gus are gifted students who go to an enchanted school to learn about magic. After receiving a book named UBOS (Ultimate Book of Spells) they soon begin their journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The women of the village revolt against the men when Tjure refuses to help them with their household chores

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's second Vengeance weapon, the deadly V2 rocket, which was responsible for killing 3,000 people in London and the south of England during six terrifying months

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann

programme.title: The Belstone Fox (1973)
programme.desc: A huntsman adopts a fox cub into his pack of hounds, and the animal becomes a local celebrity, until a disastrous hunt turns his human friends against him. Wildlife adventure based on David Rook's novel, starring Eric Porter, Bill Travers and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike and Laura agree to go on a date, but chaos ensues in the restaurant when Laura loses a contact lens. Starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Laura buys a new dress for a special dinner with Ben. However, when her date reveals he is married, Mike happens by to pick up the pieces with his usual charm. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Wembley Gold
programme.desc: A look back at the 1987 FA Cup final as Coventry pulled off one of the great giant killings against heavy favourites Tottenham

programme.title: Wembley Gold
programme.desc: A look back at the legendary 1988 FA Cup final where Wimbledon's Crazy Gang took on Liverpool's Culture Club

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1989 FA Cup final between rivals Everton and Liverpool. The game was played only five weeks after the Hillsborough disaster, in which 96 Liverpool fans were killed

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1990 FA Cup final replay between Crystal Palace and Manchester United. The original match finished 3-3, with substitute Ian Wright scoring two goals for the Eagles

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1991 FA Cup final between Nottingham Forest and Tottenham. This was Brian Clough's first appearance in English football's showpiece fixture

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1992 FA Cup final between Liverpool and Sunderland. This was the first final to feature a Second Division team since Queens Park Rangers reached the final in 1982

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1993 FA Cup final replay between Arsenal and Sheffield Wednesday. The original match finished 1-1, with a goal apiece from Ian Wright and David Hirst

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1994 FA Cup final between Chelsea and Manchester United, who were looking to win the competition for an eighth time, matching the record set by Tottenham Hotspur

programme.title: WWE Friday Night SmackDown
programme.desc: See all your favourite WWE SmackDown Superstars deliver edge-of-your-seat action, including Roman Reigns, Sasha Banks, Seth Rollins and Bianca Belair

programme.desc: Watch Drew McIntyre, Asuka, Kofi Kingston and Charlotte Flair and more of your favourite WWE Superstars face-off inside the ring on WWE Monday Night Raw

programme.desc: Highlights from the latest episode of WWE NXT

programme.title: Hyundai A-League Highlights
programme.desc: A review of all the goals and talking points from the weekend's A-League games

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1995 FA Cup final between Everton and holders Manchester United. United were looking to avoid having their first barren season for six years

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1996 FA Cup final between Manchester United and Liverpool. Eric Cantona was looking to become the first captain from outside the British Isles to lift the trophy

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1997 FA Cup final between Chelsea and Middlesbrough. Chelsea, managed by Ruud Gullit, went in to the match hoping to win their first major trophy in 27 years

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1998 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Newcastle. The Gunners were looking to emulate the famous 1971 league and cup double winning side

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1999 FA Cup final between Manchester United and Newcastle. The Reds entered the match as Premier League champions having clinched the title the previous weekend

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2000 FA Cup final between Aston Villa and Chelsea, the last final to be played at the old Wembley Stadium. This was Aston Villa's first final appearance since 1957

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2001 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Liverpool at the Millennium Stadium, the first final in which the managers of both teams were from outside the British Isles

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2002 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Chelsea. Freddie Ljungberg was aiming to become the first man to score in successive Cup finals since Bobby Smith for Spurs

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Southampton at the Millennium Stadium. The final was the first to be played indoors; the roof was closed due to bad weather

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2004 FA Cup final between Manchester United and Millwall. The Lions became only the second team from outside the top flight to reach the final since 1982

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2005 FA Cup final between Arsenal and Manchester United. This was the first final to have been decided via penalty shootout

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2006 FA Cup final between Liverpool and West Ham. This six-goal thriller is widely regarded as one of the greatest finals in the history of the competition

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2007 FA Cup final between Chelsea and Manchester United. This was the first competitive game to be held at the new Wembley

programme.title: FA Cup Final Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2008 FA Cup final between Cardiff City and Portsmouth. Cardiff were hoping to become the first club from outside England's top division to win the Cup since 1980

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. Brentford agonisingly missed out on automatic promotion on the final day of the regular campaign, but recovered to defeat Swindon Town on penalties in their semi-final, while Yeovil were 2-1 aggregate victors over Sheffield United

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.desc: Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur. The showpiece match in English football's second cup competition at Wembley Stadium
